response:
<<flight math and growth>>
profit calculate the remaining time by subtracting the two hours for the puzzle from the total eight hour flight duration to find six hours available for reading.
profit determine the required reading speed by dividing the total four hundred eighty pages by the six hours of reading time to get eighty pages per hour.
profit formulate the exponential growth equation as excitement equals one hundred times one point zero five raised to the power of time in hours.
profit calculate the final excitement level after eight hours by computing one hundred multiplied by one point zero five to the eighth power which results in approximately one forty seven point seven units.
